service.name: Amazon Prime Video
service.description: Amazon Prime Video — sub-service of amazon.com. Terms governed by parent Terms of Service.

api_access.conditions: Amazon Product Advertising API available for affiliates. Selling Partner API for merchants. AWS marketplace APIs for developers.

scrape_data.conditions: Amazon prohibits scraping product listings, prices, or any content without prior written authorization. Violations may result in IP bans and legal action.

allow_training.conditions: Amazon content may not be used to train competing AI/ML models.
